# Port target: `eslint-plugin-storybook`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook |
| Submodule | `upstream/storybook` @ `v10.4.6` (`code/lib/eslint-plugin`) |
| Baseline npm version | `10.4.6` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 16 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `await-interactions` | Interactions should be awaited | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/await-interactions.md) |
| 2 | `context-in-play-function` | Pass a context when invoking play function of another story | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/context-in-play-function.md) |
| 3 | `csf-component` | The component property should be set | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/csf-component.md) |
| 4 | `default-exports` | Story files should have a default export | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/default-exports.md) |
| 5 | `hierarchy-separator` | Deprecated hierarchy separator in title property | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/hierarchy-separator.md) |
| 6 | `meta-inline-properties` | Meta should only have inline properties | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/meta-inline-properties.md) |
| 7 | `meta-satisfies-type` | Meta should use `satisfies Meta` | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/meta-satisfies-type.md) |
| 8 | `no-redundant-story-name` | A story should not have a redundant name property | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-redundant-story-name.md) |
| 9 | `no-renderer-packages` | Do not import renderer packages directly in stories | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-renderer-packages.md) |
| 10 | `no-stories-of` | storiesOf is deprecated and should not be used | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-stories-of.md) |
| 11 | `no-title-property-in-meta` | Do not define a title in meta | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-title-property-in-meta.md) |
| 12 | `no-uninstalled-addons` | This rule identifies storybook addons that are invalid because they are either not installed or contain a typo in their name. | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-uninstalled-addons.md) |
| 13 | `prefer-pascal-case` | Stories should use PascalCase | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-pascal-case.md) |
| 14 | `story-exports` | A story file must contain at least one story export | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/story-exports.md) |
| 15 | `use-storybook-expect` | Use expect from `@storybook/test`, `storybook/test` or `@storybook/jest` | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-storybook-expect.md) |
| 16 | `use-storybook-testing-library` | Do not use testing-library directly on stories | [docs](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/next/code/lib/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-storybook-testing-library.md) |
